title: Pentacalia nitida
taxonomy: Pentacalia nitida is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification places it among the flowering plants, more specifically within the order Asterales. Pentacalia nitida is further classified within the subfamily Asteroideae, which comprises a large group of flowering plants with similar characteristics. At the genus level, Pentacalia nitida is classified within the genus Pentacalia, a group of flowering plants primarily found in the Americas. The exact species classification is within the Pentacalia nitida species itself.
